site.title: Ahmet Burak Tekin
site.description: Front-end developer building resilient digital platforms for the public sector.

hero.title: Front-end developer building resilient digital platforms.
hero.description: I'm Ahmet Burak Tekin, leading the front-end team at Türkiye's Ministry of Interior. I architect React and TypeScript applications that manage nationwide authorization, analytics, and operational workflows for thousands of public servants every day while mentoring a team of four developers and driving modernization across the organization.

contact.title: Let's build together
contact.description: Have a front-end platform to ship or a team that needs mentorship? Reach out and let's create reliable systems for the public sector.

cv.title: Ahmet Burak Tekin · CV
cv.description: Download the latest PDF or browse the embedded preview below.

about.title: I'm Ahmet Burak Tekin, a front-end developer helping Türkiye's public sector deliver dependable digital services.
about.p1: Based in Ankara, I specialize in architecting React and TypeScript applications that power critical government services. I led the front-end design of the Ministry of Interior's authorization management system, creating the workflows that keep permissions and approvals synchronized across every province.
about.p2: My day-to-day involves mentoring a team of four developers while collaborating closely with Java Spring Boot teams to deliver secure, well-tested integrations. I maintain the organization's authentication gateway built on JWT and OAuth, and keep a nationwide analytics platform running smoothly for stakeholders in all 81 provinces.
about.p3: Beyond authorization and analytics, I launch new internal tools — from data query applications that unlock reporting across directorates to bespoke photo processing workflows and visitor management dashboards. Each project is an opportunity to embed modern front-end practices into institutions that millions rely on daily.
about.p4: Earlier in my career at EBS Computer Systems & IT I built responsive interfaces, WordPress sites, and SQL reports that served complex accounting workflows. My internships at public and private organizations gave me firsthand insight into enterprise software delivery, shaping how I approach large-scale projects today.
about.p5: I stay curious through community work with JCI Ankara and JCI Europe, where I've served on growth, digital platforms, and outreach teams — most recently as Secretary General and a Development Council Officer. Giving back keeps me learning and ensures the solutions I design stay grounded in real human needs.
about.cvLink: Curious about the full story? You can view my CV here.
